case_title: MANSURI, MEHMUD VS DISCOUNT LIQUOR GROCERY STORE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANSURI, MEHMUD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DISCOUNT LIQUOR GROCERY STORE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DISCOUNT LIQUOR GROCERY STORE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MANSURI, MEHMUD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO MANSURI MOHMUD RETURNED SIGNED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DISCOUNT LIQUOR GROCERY STORE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MANSURI, MEHMUD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOUNT LIQUOR GROCERY STORE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
